summary: Added a pure reusable Nutrition kernel with 46 canonical nutrient definitions; explicit missing-versus-zero vector arithmetic; reliable-energy priority and documented 4/4/9/7 fallback; macro distribution; optional/excluded ingredient aggregation with explicit edible, drained, retention, confidence and completeness factors; total/per-serving/per-100g/fractional-portion scaling; distinct target/range/limit semantics; separate planned/consumed totals; missing-day-safe rolling trends; and visibility-filtered normalized household comparisons. Added 35 focused unit tests. No Pantry, schema, migration, recipe, planner, cooking, UI, documentation, or unrelated dirty file was touched.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Worker exceeded the single-wait limit without writing files, so the PM executed the same two-file package as permitted fallback.

The first typecheck attempt observed a transient externally owned Pantry missing-component error plus one local union-narrowing error; the local error was fixed within scope, the concurrent Pantry file appeared, and the required fresh typecheck passed.
